title: Succour
description: Soft and bubbly take on Minecraft in 32x
body:
Succour is a 32x32 resource pack that upscales the vanilla game by giving materials a more defined, bubblier appearance. Smoother textures and lighter colours contribute to a more dreamy look with a vanilla-like base.


You can preview the visual aesthetics of this resource pack below:

![A two-story house with a vibrant red roof on a small hill surrounded by greenery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1853945466cec89a97ff75bd84e9c676208efb48.png)


![Street corner of a medieval town. Camera is looking upwards at a two-storey stone building.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6728b270e167b8b424c045c7bacae6e4eb77b6d.png)
